description:
Feeling Good!  What's for Dinner?  We are so glad to be feeling good for a change.  We were sick for almost a week!  We apologize for only being able to get one vlog in the last week.  Mom really couldn't get out of bed she was in so much pain.  Luckily, I was able to manage most things, even though I wasn't feeling good.  That was a hard week!

Our dilemma today was What's for Dinner?  We finally decided on Taco soup!  It's difficult at times to decide what's for dinner, because there is almost always two or three of us that don't like a certain dish.  Taco Soup is one that everyone loves!

description:
Cookies! Crazy Shopping! Our Family Vlog today is all Lacey giving us stress!  She needed to have Chocolate Chip Cookies at the County Fair by 6pm for her Culinary class in High School.  We had less than 2 hours to pull it off, so we had to do some crazy shopping to get the missing ingredients.  She did it though, and they were really good!

There was talk of cheating, but I promise you she did not cheat!  These Chocolate Chip Cookies are from scratch!  I was not very happy that we had to run around crazy shopping to find the ingredients we needed, but it actually turned out to be a lot of fun!  I got to eat some really good cookies too!

description:
Making of Bangla Movie Tarkata (2014) ft Arifin Shuvoo and Bidya Sinha Saha Mim by Mohammad Mostafa Kamal Raz

Taarkata is a 2014 Bangladesh romantic thriller film written and directed by Mohammad Mostafa Kamal Raj, starring Arifin Shuvoo, Mim Bidya Sinha Saha with Arifa Parvin Moushumi, Ahmed Sharif, Ejajul Islam and Faruk Ahmed in supporting roles. The film was produced by Shukla Banik under Ping Pong Entertainment banner.

The story centers around Ibrahim, a notorious criminal who falls for Chad, an aspiring singer who comes from a middle-class family. First part of the film explores the events, which led to Ibrahim becoming a criminal. The second part of the film introduces the antagonist.

Taarkata (2014)
Directed by :  Mohammad Mostafa Kamal Raz
Produced by : Shukla Banik
Written by :  Mohammad Mostofa Kamal Raj
Starring :   Arefin Shuvo, Bidya Sinha Mim, Moushumi
Music by :  Arfin Rumey
Edited by :  Farhad Ahmed
Distributed by : Jaaz Multimedia, Ping Pong Entertainment
Release date :  6 June 2014
Country :  Bangladesh


Awards

National Film Awards, Bangladesh 2014

Won : Merit Award
Best Actress in a Leading Role : Mousumi (Actress)
Best Actor in a Supporting Role : Ejazul Islam (Actor)

Won Technical Award
Best Art Direction Samurai Maruf (Art Director)


Synopsis
The story centers around a middle class brother and sister, Ibrahim (Arifin Shuvoo) and Mousumi, and their family. Ibrahim becomes involved in illegal activities with a gang and causes others to be fearful when he acted as a Mafia don. He becomes romantically involved with Biddya Sinha Mim. It is an action film with romance, starring three very capable stars.


Cast (in credits order)

Arifin Shuvo
Bidya Sinha Saha Mim
Mousumi
Ejazul Islam
Musa Raj
Faruk Ahmed
Aslam Sheikh
Ahmed Sharif
Hasan Masood
Kachi Khandakar
Lubaba Diya
Joya Chatterjee
Parijaat Chakraborty

Music
The music of the film has been composed by Arifin Rumey. Music has been produced under the banner of Laser Vision. The music was released on April 10, 2014. The album consists of 12 tracks.

1. "Tarkata (Title Track)" Dilshad Nahar Kona, Parvez 6:14
2. "Tumihina" Arfin Rumey & Liza, Arfin Rumey & Naumi 6:42
3. "Jalsa Ghor" Palak Muchhal (5:18)
4. "Bondhon" Sunidhi Chauhan (6:20)
5. "Noyon Moni" Arfin Rumey, Baby Naznin (5:55)
6. "Ghagra" Mamta Sharma (4:20)
7. "Ami Tumi" Arfin Rumey, Puja (4:17)

description:
So why won't you talk to me?
Why won't you just talk to me?
There's a universe inside your head,
constellations of the things you left unsaid.
Talk to me or watch me leave."

SPOILERS FOR SEVEN'S CGS

I wasn't sure what name to call him. He has three of them. ^^ I love Seven so much! He's most definitely my favorite out of the entire game. (But I think he's everyone's favorite to be honest)
I tried to combine two different themes in this AMV- Space (Getting married at the space station) and technology (For obvious reasons). I felt this song really captures the MC's feelings during the middle of his route.
This concludes each of my Mystic Messenger character routes AMVs.
Thanks so much for watching! ^^
(This one was so serious, so I might make a funny one later, IDK)

The song is Talk to me by Lauren Aquilin

So, I wrote a book!

'So, About That... A Year of Contemporary Essays on Race and Pop Culture'

A Compilation of Essays on the Biggest Stories in Race and Pop Culture... From Ferguson, the movement that mobilized a generation, to Rachel Dolezal, the woman who had everyone questioning what it means to REALLY be Black, this book will examine the broader concepts behind issues of race and pop culture in today's society. How does racism affect our daily lives? How does it affect the media that we consume, or the way that we consume it? How do we REALLY feel about race? It all starts with a simple question... "So, about that?"

description:
Our very own Jack O'Connell (Cook) stars in this gritty British prison drama, Starred Up.

Starred Up follows a troubled young offender named Eric (O'Connell) who, because of his violent and erratic behavior, is transferred to the same adult prison where his estranged father (Ben Mendelsohn) is being held. Out of control and fighting constantly the prison guards and his fellow inmates, Jack is sent to work with Oliver (Homeland's Rupert Friend), a volunteer psychotherapist who recognizes Jack's untapped warmth and potential. As Jack works to improve himself, he must decide whether to finally forgive his father before it's too late.

In UK cinemas today!

For classic Skins moments and exclusive YouTube content make sure you subscribe to our Official YouTube Channel - http://bit.ly/OhaqqS

description:
CLICK TO WATCH FULL DOCUMENTARY ONLINE: http://www.docsonline.tv/documentary/48

Story

The inhabitants of the village of Potosi in Bolivia predominantly live off the yield from the mines of Cerro Rico (rich hill). For hundreds of years, they've been mining minerals like silver and zinc there. Time seems to have stood still in Potosi. No large machines, just a hammer and chisel, headlamps and sticks of dynamite. But Cerro Rico is nearing depletion, so the locals have to find new sources of income. This lyrical documentary with social- economical undertone, not only gives an inside view of the fascinating hardships of the silver mines but also of a culture slowly losing its way.
title: Visiting the mines of Potosi, Bolivia

description:

Story

Velo Negro by director Arjanne Laan is a slow, yet impressive feature documentary about Mexican immigrants in the U.S. Though the film was produced in 1996, The film still provides an up-to-date and in-depth analyses of immigration affaires at the US-Mexican border. Velo Negro shows that the desire to have a home is just as strong as the dream of leaving. If you want to understand why Mexicans leave their country, despite the dangers and uncertainties that lay ahead, Velo Negro is a must see.

If you've read Khaled Hosseini bestsellers A thousand splendid suns or Kite Runner, than the documentary film The Return by Joost Verhey is a must see. The Return takes you back to the Afghan refugee camps in 1989/1990. At the time, the extend of the refugee problem was simply staggering; yet, hardly noticed by the western world. As a one-off situation director and anthropologist Verhey visited several Afghan refugees camps, including Jalozai, in 1989, sketching the problems of those living in these camps.

Story

Rock 'n 'Roll Junkie is a 1994 documentary film about the life of the well-known Dutch artist Herman Brood, who committed suicide in 2001. Four filmmakers followed their youth idol for over two years. This film gives a detailed image of Broods life as an artist by combining images of his daily life with interviews with his band members, his girlfriends and his mother.
title: Herman Brood about drug addiction

Language: Cantonese

Cast:  Eric Tsang, Sandra Ng, Wong Cho-Lam, Yuen Wah, Ronald Cheng

Synopsis:
During the early years of Republic era, in the North-East region of China, people are suffering from the power struggle among the local Warlords, bandits and Japanese invaders. Warlord Lam (Sammo Hung), is not a leader of great vision, but having a patriotic heart, stands firm in his own beliefs, despite the several solicitations and temptations from Japan. The only `paradise` within the region is `Lucky Town`, the one place where no one dared to attack. In reality, there are seven kung fu masters who have retreated into the shadows and resided here. They are Manysons (Eric Tsang) Madonna (Sandra Ng), Madonhung (Xie Na), Nam Mor Bing (Yuen Wah), Horny Four (Wong Cho Lam), Little Trumpet (Ronald Cheng), and Mamasan Maggie (Natalie Meng). Every one of them is a master in his own right, keeping Lucky Town in peace.

description: Seven years in the making, "CZ12" cost US$50 million (S$61.1 million) to shoot, and also stars Korean heartthrob Kwon Sang Woo. Jackie Chan's spectacular new adventure takes him all the way from the chateaux and vineyards of France and the hidden dangers of a jungle on a South Seas island to the terrors of a fight in free-fall above an active volcano! The story is sprung on a quest to track down six bronze sculptures, originally part of a set of twelve representing the animals of the Chinese Zodiac which were looted from the Summer Palace in Beijing when the city was sacked by European armies in the 19th century. At the same time there's an international campaign in progress to demand the return of stolen cultural treasures to their countries of origin. But Jackie plays a soldier of fortune, not a high-minded patriot. He's in it for the money. But as events take unexpected turns and strange alliances take shape, motives begin to change ...

description:
Release date: 3 Jan 2013 (Malaysia)

Director: Wong Jing

Cast:  Chow Yun Fat , Sammo Hung, Huang Xiaoming, Francis Ng

Synopsis
It was 1917, China. CHENG (Chow Yun-fat) was an innocent young man who worked in a grocery store and had no ambition, other than to be with his lovely neighbor, the Peking Opera student QIU. But a fateful night had changed Cheng`s life forever, as he literally walked right in the affair between his lady boss and the chief of police. To hide this secret, the chief decided to throw Cheng into prison, accusing him of raping his lady boss. Desolated, Cheng met a cellmate MAO, who happened to have an escape plan. The duo broke out, and Cheng had no choice but to leave his life, and his dream girl behind. Cheng found a job as a bouncer in the casino owned by the powerful inspector JIN (Sammo HUNG). As Jin indulged himself in debauchery all day long, Cheng began to climb up the underworld ladder step by step. He soon won the affection of the famed songstress BO. Although Bo loved him deeply, but Cheng found his heart belonged only to the vanished Qiu. As Cheng became one of most powerful mob bosses in Shanghai in the late 1930s, fame took its toll when he found himself stuck between the looming Japanese army and the scheming local secret service. To make things worse, he bumped into the love of his life Qiu, along with her writer husband. Would love re-kindle at the dusk of an era?

description: Globe-trotting soldier-of-fortune JC is hired by shady antiques dealers to track down six missing bronze animal-heads by any means necessary. The six bronzes originally formed part of a set of twelve, representing the animals of the Chinese Zodiac, forming part of a fountain in the old Summer Palace outside Beijing; they were looted and dispersed when Anglo-French armies sacked the Summer Palace in 1860. JC and his crack team of assistants first head to France, then to a forgotten tropical island in the South Seas. Back home, JC is stunned to learn that his employers already had the sixth missing bronze all along, and he sets out to teach them a lesson for tricking him. Will JC`s conscience - and his sense of Chinese national pride - kick in to push him to save the last bronze from destruction? The answer is played out on the slopes of an active volcano ...

ONLY AT GSC MID VALLEY

'The Flying Machine: The World of Chopin's Ã‰tudes' is a unique, one-off film event in breath-taking 3D, which celebrated the 200th anniversary of Fryderyk Chopin's birth.

Audiences are invited to experience the transformative power of Chopin's music, as they watch the Flying Machine take to the skies for a series of animated adventures through the imaginations of nine acclaimed international directors, set to a rousing soundtrack performed by super-star pianist Lang Lang.

Meet Anna and her little cousin Chip Chip who must take to the skies in an amazing Flying Machine to travel home, crissâ€crossing the world and experiencing a series of action packed, lifeâ€affirming adventures along the way; experience the bravery and heroism of the Little Postman as he delivers mail through war-torn city streets; triumph with Papa's Boy when he bravely follows his dream and in so doing, earns the respect of his father; and alongside stressed, busy mother-of-two Georgie (played by Heather Graham) rediscover the inspirational power of Chopin's music and the power of imagination.

description:
In Cinemas 14 June 2012, Malaysia

College student Shi has a terminal illness. These are experiences she knows she'll probably never have, like falling in love. So when an old high school crush named Gong suddenly resurfaces, she is surprised and swept away by his interest in her. Because side effects of her medication cause Shi to suffer short-term memory loss, she recounts everything onto cassette tape to remember the details of their precious time together. But Shi doesn't know that her mother, wishing to give her a chance to experience romance before it's too late, actually hired Gong to pursue her.

Genre: Crime/ thriller


Synopsis
One Day, a medium built stammerer, Jun (Wang Bao Qiang) confesses five murders at police station, but he fails to illustrate the details, after long oral examination the police believes Jun is mentally disorder and his mentioned murder cases do not come from the fact.
Soon after, a cold-blooded murder unveils a series of mysterious murders in the district where Detective Han (Lau Ching Wan) stations in. Each of the victims is executed by different but equally brutal way. Han knows that he is dealing with a serial killer. Instinct tells him Jun is the suspense after he goes over all recent statements. His team goes and rummages around in Jun's apartment, except a pile of old fairy tale books, no criminal evidence is found in the messy apartment.
One night, Han gets inspired when his wife is reading bedtime story to their son, mentioning the way to inflict punishment upon villains in the story. He immediately sets off to examine the fairy tale books page by page in Jun's apartment. The team discovers mysterious symbols on the last pages of five books, and the punishments to villains described in two of the books match the setting of two previous murders, evidences show that three more vicious murders will happen. All of a sudden, Jun is back and arrested by Han.

The police are still lack of evidences to drop any charge on Jun, Jun refuses to say anything about the next planned murder, which prevents Han from saving the next victim, time is running out, Han is desperate to save the poor sufferers...

Director: SJ Clarkson

Cast: Helena Bonham Carter, Ken Stott, Victoria Hamilton, Freddie Highmore

Synopsis: TOAST is the ultimate nostalgia trip through everything edible in 1960's
Britain. Based on the heart-wrenchingly bittersweet story of food writer, Nigel
Slater's childhood, and set to the songs of Dusty Springfield, TOAST is a
delicious love letter to the tastes and smells that a young boy associates with
his journey into adulthood.


This movie will be released exclusively under the GSC International Screens banner at Mid Valley, 1 Utama and Pavillion KL.

About GSC International Screens : The GSC International Screens located exclusively at GSC Mid Valley, GSC 1-Utama and GSC Pavilion are the first of its kind in Malaysia to be dedicated to the screening of non-mainstream, art house and foreign language films.  The first GSC International Screens was launched at GSC Mid Valley on 2 Dec 1999 with an objective to cater to the ever growing sophistication of the movie-going audience by providing alternative programming in the form of award-winning non-mainstream films in all languages.  The GSC International Screens were subsequently expanded to GSC 1-Utama on in 2005 and GSC Pavilion in 2007.  Since its first launching, dozens of award-winning foreign language films have been showcased.  It is also the annual venue for much anticipated film festivals viz Japanese Film Festival, French Film Festival and European Film Festival. In 2004, GSC eCinema was launched as an extension of GSC International Screens to provide local independent Directors who shoot on digital video cameras, an alternative platform to showcase their work in a cinema without having to convert their work to costly 35mm format.  Its debut film was "Visits:Hungry Ghost Anthology", a culmination of four ghost stories by four award-winning local Directors (Ho Yuhang, James Lee, Low Ngai Yuen and Ng Tian Hann).

description: Ben Singer is a failed children's folk singer, a career proofreader and a less-than-extraordinary weekend dad. He's also the most negative man alive. Floundering in all aspects of his life, Ben's only comfort comes from friendly debates on game theory with his Senegalese roommate Ibou. When Ibou is suddenly struck ill, and an insensitive municipal employee exacerbates the emergency situation, Ben's pessimistic worldview seems unequivocally confirmed. His only recourse is to pour his energies into a frivolous lawsuit against the city for depraved indifference. But Ben soon finds that cynicism may be all a matter of perspective. Coming soon under GSC International Screens, exclusively at GSC Mid Valley, GSC Pavilion KL & GSC 1 Utama on 20 Sept 2012.

What started as a chance meeting in the back alley for a smoke, ended up in a romance for Jimmy Cheung and Cherie Yue. Six months later, Cherie can no longer stand Jimmy's habit of dragging his feet on everything and Jimmy is tired of Cherie's temper tantrums. When Jimmy is offered a lucrative position in Beijing, their love in a puff is snuffed out.
On one of his business trips to Shanghai, Jimmy meets a flight attendant Shang You-you, who falls in love with him immediately. Meanwhile, Cherie is sent to Beijing to open a new shop, where she meets and starts to date Sam, a Malaysian Chinese who works for an I.T. company...

Malaysia release date: 19 April 2012
title: Love In The Buff ã€Šæ˜¥å¬Œèˆ‡å¿—æ˜Žã€‹Trailer

description:
Language: Thai

Genre: Horror

Ten years ago, a young air hostess, , miraculously survived a plane crash. New insists that a vengeful spirit caused that accident, but her belief unsettled those around her and she had to go through a psycho-therapy. Now, the woman is ready to fly again. But on her first flight, New is struck by a disturbing feeling. The plane on which she's working looks familiar, and New realizes that it's actually the same aircraft that crashed ten years ago, though it has been repaired and repainted. New is gripped by terror, but there's nothing she can do because the plane has already taken off, along with the same vengeful spirits that reside in it. Up in the air, the spirits are determined to take her life this time.

Thailand's first flight horror movie is ready to take off. It will be the darkest flight of your life!

description:
OPENS 15 DECEMBER 2011
(English & Mandarin with English subtitles)

Synopsis:
In 19th-century China, seven year old girls Snow Flower and Lily are matched as laotong - or "old sames" - bound together for eternity. Isolated by their families, they furtively communicate by taking turns writing in a secret language, nu shu, between the folds of a white silk fan. In a parallel story in present day Shanghai, the laotong's descendants, Nina and Sophia, struggle to maintain the intimacy of their own childhood friendship in the face of demanding careers, complicated love lives, and a relentlessly evolving Shanghai. Drawing on the lessons of the past, the two modern women must understand the story of their ancestral connection, hidden from them in the folds of the antique white silk fan, or risk losing one another forever.

Director:
Wayne Wang
title: Snow Flower and The Secret Fan

description:
Will Gerard (Nicolas Cage) is a dedicated, inner-city high school English teacher, happily married to an accomplished musician, Laura (January Jones).  They enjoy a comfortable domestic life built around orchestral concerts, backyard BBQs and Will's favorite pastime, chess matches with his school's principal (Harold Perrineau).

One horrific night shatters their lives.  While departing a studio rehearsal, Laura is victimized by a brutal sexual assault.  Anxiously awaiting an update on her condition at the hospital, Will is approached by a well-dressed man (Guy Pearce) who quietly offers to dispense immediate justice and spare the couple the ordeal of an emotionally painful trial.  Required to make a spontaneous decision in a distraught frame of mind, he accepts the proposal, and is pulled into an underground vigilante organization that leads to increasingly frightening and dangerous consequences.

Opens 17th November 2011!

Synopsis:
Two Legged Horse (Asbe du-pa) tells the story of a father who must go to India but has no family members to look after his young son whose legs were maimed in a landmine accident.  Thus, he hires a boy for a dollar a day to carry his son on his back -- be it to the school and to do as his son bids.  In reality, the son does not need any help or "horse" to carry him around as he is very capable of getting around on his own by jumping on one leg at great speed.  The son's whims include not only verbal and physical abuse, but also repeated "horse fights" where "the horse" will be continually knocked down.  Even "the horse's" tender feelings for a child girl beggar are exploited and mocked.  Because of the brutal and degrading treatment, "the horse" finds himself becoming more and more similar to a real horse.

Director:
Samira Makhmalbaf

Awards :
Special Prize of the Jury (Shamira Makhmalbaf) at San Sebastian International Film Festival, Georges Delerue Prize (Best Music) at Gent International Film Festival.

Exclusively at GSC Mid Valley, GSC 1 Utama and GSC Pavilion KL.

description:
In 19th century, the Prince Regent of the crumbling Qing Dynasty orders the mass execution of the entire Meng clan. Before his beheading in a crowded  marketplace, the Meng clan leader vows that his family will avenge this travesty of justice. Awaiting his death, a five-year-old Meng boy named Erkui bravely sings an aria. The power and purity of his voice touches the onlookers including opera star Master Yu Shengying and his seven-year-old pupil Guan Yilong. Deeply moved, Master Yu rescues the boy and the two orphans, Yilong and Erkui, become brothers.

Years later, Master Yu wins the coveted golden "Wu Sheng Tai Dou" (The Mightiest Warrior) plaque from the Prince Regent, but subsequently loses it in a duel with his archrival Master Yue Jiangtian. Banished from the stage upon his loss, Master Yu spends his time training Yilong and Erkui in Peking Opera and martial arts, perfecting their skills. When the boys grow into men, they set off for to pursue revenge and reclaim the plaque from Master Yue.

Once they reach , they quickly defeat Master Yue, reclaiming not only the plaque but also becoming the new masters of Yue's opera troupe. Almost overnight, they become sensations of the  opera scene along with Master Yue's protÃ©gÃ© and former lover, the beautiful actress Xi Mulan. But soon, their collective pasts catch up with them and all three ends up in a complex web of love, lust, deceit and betrayal, ultimately ending in tragedy.

In 742 A.D., two Japanese monks, Yoei and Fusho, visited Ven. Jian Zhen in Yangzhou and told him about their desire to take the Buddhist precepts to Japan. 9 takes place in a world parallel to our own, in which the very legacy of humanity is threatened. A group of sapient rag dolls, living a post-apocalyptic existence find one of their own, 9 (Elijah Wood), who displays leadership qualities that may help them to survive.

There are at least several malevolent creatures up against this group; namely, the cat-skulled creature from the short film, a split-headed flying being that resembles both a bat and a manta ray in wing shape, and an insectoid creature with jointed legs and a pod-like body.

How to Speed Up Footage:
In Final Cut X, go to the â€˜retimeâ€™ menu next to the effects panel, and choose â€˜customâ€™. Then type in a percentage, 200% = 2x speed.
In Adobe Premiere,  right-click over a selected clip and choose Speed/Duration.

Change Duration to 1 Frame:
In Final Cut X, drop all of the images into the timeline, select all then Ctrl-D and type '1', then hit enter.
In Adobe Premiere, Choose File, Import, and click the first image in your image sequence. Click the Image Sequence check box at the bottom of the Import dialog box, then click the Import button.

description: So, there are a few videos on You Tube of Scud Race, emulated on MAME, running on overclocked dual and quad core PCs, at a pretty decent frame rate, but not quite full speed. I thought I'd show the flipside of that; Scud Race running on a (single core) Pentium 4. I think it's running at about 10% of the speed of the proper arcade game, and slows down even further when the CPU gets busy.
title: Scud Race

description:
Here's a trailer of Sleeping Starlight

Filled with jealousy, the evil witch Lady Bat (Susanne Blakeslee) curses Princess Starlight Glimmer (Kate Higgins) to die on her 16th birthday. Thanks to Starlight Glimmer's guardian fairies (Tress MacNeille), she only falls into a deep sleep that can be ended with a kiss from her betrothed, Prince Mouhamad Bassal (Josh Robert Thompson). To prevent Mouhamad Bassal from rescuing Starlight Glimmer, Lady Bat kidnaps and imprisons him. The good fairies are the last hope to free Mouhamad Bassal so that he can awaken Starlight Glimmer.

In the honor of Maleficent 2: Mistress of Evil

In the memory of Russi Taylor.

This is a tutorial for drawing a beautiful full moon night with ms paint..I used only my laptop to draw this picture.. no mouse or any other input devices...It is a very simple drawing and for me it took about 35 minutes to complete it.. I am a self taught artist and am always looking to improve.
